title: Realty Income Acquires 94-Property Retail Portfolio Across Sunbelt Markets
summary: Realty Income completed the acquisition of a 94-property net lease retail portfolio across key Sunbelt markets for approximately $1.2 billion, adding tenants including Dollar General, CVS, and Tractor Supply.
full_text: Realty Income Corporation (NYSE: O) completed a strategic acquisition of a 94-property net lease retail portfolio spanning Dallas, Phoenix, and Atlanta for approximately $1.2 billion. Properties are 100% leased on long-term net leases with a weighted average remaining lease term of 9.4 years.

title: Realty Income Reports Strong Q2 2024 Results; Raises Full-Year AFFO Guidance
summary: Realty Income reported Q2 2024 AFFO per share of $1.06, up 6% year-over-year. The company raised its full-year 2024 AFFO guidance to $4.17-$4.21 per diluted share.
full_text: Realty Income Corporation reported Q2 2024 AFFO of $1.06 per diluted share, a 6% increase year-over-year. Total revenues reached $1.34 billion. Portfolio occupancy was 98.8%.

title: Realty Income Expands European Portfolio with $950M UK Retail Acquisition
summary: Realty Income announced the acquisition of 68 freestanding retail properties across the United Kingdom for $950 million, furthering its international diversification strategy.
full_text: Realty Income acquired 68 freestanding net lease retail properties in the UK for $950 million. Properties are 100% occupied with an average remaining lease term of 11.2 years, leased to Sainsbury's, B&Q, and Halfords.

title: Realty Income Declares 668th Consecutive Monthly Dividend
summary: Realty Income declared its 668th consecutive monthly dividend of $0.2635 per share, maintaining its status as The Monthly Dividend Company and S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrat.
full_text: Realty Income declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.2635 per share, its 668th consecutive monthly dividend and 124th dividend increase since listing on the NYSE in 1994.

title: Realty Income Closes $1.5B Sale-Leaseback of Encore Boston Harbor Casino
summary: Realty Income completed a $1.5 billion sale-leaseback for Encore Boston Harbor, expanding its gaming and entertainment property segment.
full_text: Realty Income completed a sale-leaseback of Encore Boston Harbor for $1.5 billion with initial annual rent of $100 million and 1.5% annual escalators. Gaming now represents approximately 4% of annualized contractual rent.

title: Realty Income Appoints New Chief Investment Officer
summary: Realty Income named a new Chief Investment Officer effective August 1, 2024, bringing 18 years of net lease investment experience.
full_text: Realty Income appointed a new CIO effective August 1, 2024, with 18 years of net lease real estate investment experience to lead its global acquisition strategy.

title: Realty Income Q1 2024 Earnings: Revenue Up 27% Year-Over-Year
summary: Realty Income reported Q1 2024 revenues of $1.26 billion, a 27% increase versus Q1 2023, driven by the Spirit Realty merger.
full_text: Realty Income reported Q1 2024 revenues of $1.26 billion, up 27% year-over-year. AFFO was $1.03 per diluted share. Portfolio occupancy was 98.6%. The company invested $598 million in 156 properties during the quarter.

title: Realty Income Completes $9.3B Merger with Spirit Realty Capital
summary: Realty Income completed its all-stock merger with Spirit Realty Capital, adding approximately 2,000 net lease properties and expanding its portfolio to over 15,000 properties.
full_text: Realty Income completed its $9.3 billion merger with Spirit Realty Capital, adding 2,000 properties and generating $50 million in annual cost synergies. Total portfolio now exceeds 15,000 properties.

title: Realty Income Reports Record Full-Year 2023 Revenue of $3.9 Billion
summary: Realty Income reported record full-year 2023 revenues of $3.9 billion, up 22% versus 2022, with AFFO of $3.92 per diluted share.
full_text: Realty Income reported record 2023 revenues of $3.9 billion, up 22% year-over-year. AFFO was $3.92 per diluted share. Year-end occupancy was 98.8% across 13,458 properties in 49 states and 7 countries.

title: Realty Income Issues $1B in Senior Unsecured Notes at 5.125%
summary: Realty Income priced $1 billion of senior unsecured notes due 2034 at 5.125%, with proceeds used to repay debt and fund future acquisitions.
full_text: Realty Income priced $1.0 billion of 5.125% senior unsecured notes due 2034. Proceeds repay revolving credit facility borrowings and fund future acquisitions. Realty Income holds an A3/A- credit rating.

title: Realty Income Enters Data Center Sector with $950M Sale-Leaseback
summary: Realty Income entered the data center sector through a $950 million sale-leaseback of seven hyperscale facilities, diversifying beyond traditional retail net lease.
full_text: Realty Income completed a $950 million sale-leaseback of seven hyperscale data center facilities in Chicago, Dallas, and Atlanta on 20-year triple-net leases with fixed annual escalators.

title: Realty Income Targets Net Zero Emissions by 2050 with New ESG Roadmap
summary: Realty Income committed to net zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050, with near-term goals to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions 50% by 2030.
full_text: Realty Income published its ESG roadmap targeting net zero emissions by 2050, a 50% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030, solar installations at 500 properties by 2026, and ENERGY STAR certification for 20% of eligible properties by 2025.
